rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside component type scopes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings like assignments
Place assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports in component type scopes
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names for assumptions and guarantees
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
generic_rules: Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, constants, equations, and assignments
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions are visible in the current scope
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
Use named constants for concrete bounds in assumptions and guarantees
Place implementation-level bindings in the appropriate component implementation scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constants
anti_patterns: Avoid placing assumptions and guarantees referring to subcomponent ports in component type scopes
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
Avoid mixing component type and implementation scopes for assumptions and guarantees
Do not use AADL unit tokens like ms/us/Hz/Bytes directly in AGREE expressions
